brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 74.9% (answer A) with correct arithmetic for both the backup-supplier and new-component changes; only surface-level calculation shown with no exploration of why the method works or second-order implications; no reflection on reasoning process, assumptions, or potential pitfalls at any point; shows step-by-step multiplication which constitutes implicit arithmetic checking but no independent cross-check or sanity test; presents the answer as certain with no acknowledgment of the independence assumption between suppliers or other modeling assumptions; considers only one computational approach with no mention of alternatives; every multiplication step is written out explicitly so a third party could fully reproduce the derivation.
